verses.text: His brethren urge Him to the feast, 'for neither did his brethren believe in him.' Unbelief near home. Even kin failed to trust Him.
His brethren urge Him to the feast, 'for neither did his brethren believe in him.' Unbelief near home. Even kin failed to trust Him.
His brethren urge Him to the feast, 'for neither did his brethren believe in him.' Unbelief near home. Even kin failed to trust Him.
His brethren urge Him to the feast, 'for neither did his brethren believe in him.' Unbelief near home. Even kin failed to trust Him.
His brethren urge Him to the feast, 'for neither did his brethren believe in him.' Unbelief near home. Even kin failed to trust Him.
'My time is not yet come'; the world hates Me, for I testify its works are evil. Hated truth. The world resents the One who exposes its sin.
'My time is not yet come'; the world hates Me, for I testify its works are evil. Hated truth. The world resents the One who exposes its sin.
'My time is not yet come'; the world hates Me, for I testify its works are evil. Hated truth. The world resents the One who exposes its sin.
'My time is not yet come'; the world hates Me, for I testify its works are evil. Hated truth. The world resents the One who exposes its sin.
He goes up secretly; the people murmur, some calling Him good, others a deceiver. Divided crowd. Christ stirs both faith and slander.
He goes up secretly; the people murmur, some calling Him good, others a deceiver. Divided crowd. Christ stirs both faith and slander.
He goes up secretly; the people murmur, some calling Him good, others a deceiver. Divided crowd. Christ stirs both faith and slander.
He goes up secretly; the people murmur, some calling Him good, others a deceiver. Divided crowd. Christ stirs both faith and slander.
'My doctrine is not mine, but his that sent me'; he that seeks God's glory is true. Heaven's teaching. His word is from the Father, not Himself.
'My doctrine is not mine, but his that sent me'; he that seeks God's glory is true. Heaven's teaching. His word is from the Father, not Himself.
'My doctrine is not mine, but his that sent me'; he that seeks God's glory is true. Heaven's teaching. His word is from the Father, not Himself.
'My doctrine is not mine, but his that sent me'; he that seeks God's glory is true. Heaven's teaching. His word is from the Father, not Himself.
'My doctrine is not mine, but his that sent me'; he that seeks God's glory is true. Heaven's teaching. His word is from the Father, not Himself.
Why seek ye to kill Me? they accuse Him of having a devil. Hatred unmasked. They plot murder while feigning piety.
Why seek ye to kill Me? they accuse Him of having a devil. Hatred unmasked. They plot murder while feigning piety.
Why seek ye to kill Me? they accuse Him of having a devil. Hatred unmasked. They plot murder while feigning piety.
They circumcise on the sabbath; 'judge not according to the appearance, but... righteous judgment.' Fair judgment. They condemn His mercy while excusing themselves.
They circumcise on the sabbath; 'judge not according to the appearance, but... righteous judgment.' Fair judgment. They condemn His mercy while excusing themselves.
They circumcise on the sabbath; 'judge not according to the appearance, but... righteous judgment.' Fair judgment. They condemn His mercy while excusing themselves.
Some ask, Is not this He they seek to kill? yet we know whence He is. Mistaken certainty. They think they know Him, and so refuse Him.
Some ask, Is not this He they seek to kill? yet we know whence He is. Mistaken certainty. They think they know Him, and so refuse Him.
Some ask, Is not this He they seek to kill? yet we know whence He is. Mistaken certainty. They think they know Him, and so refuse Him.
Ye know Me not, nor Him that sent Me; they seek to take Him, yet many believe. Mixed response. Some harden, others come to faith.
Ye know Me not, nor Him that sent Me; they seek to take Him, yet many believe. Mixed response. Some harden, others come to faith.
Ye know Me not, nor Him that sent Me; they seek to take Him, yet many believe. Mixed response. Some harden, others come to faith.
Ye know Me not, nor Him that sent Me; they seek to take Him, yet many believe. Mixed response. Some harden, others come to faith.
Officers are sent to take Him; 'yet a little while am I with you, then I go unto him that sent me.' Brief stay. He foretells His departure to the Father.
Officers are sent to take Him; 'yet a little while am I with you, then I go unto him that sent me.' Brief stay. He foretells His departure to the Father.

'If any man thirst, let him come unto me, and drink'; rivers of living water; He spoke of the Spirit. Open invitation. Christ promises the Spirit to all who come thirsting.
'If any man thirst, let him come unto me, and drink'; rivers of living water; He spoke of the Spirit. Open invitation. Christ promises the Spirit to all who come thirsting.
'If any man thirst, let him come unto me, and drink'; rivers of living water; He spoke of the Spirit. Open invitation. Christ promises the Spirit to all who come thirsting.
The people are divided, some saying the Prophet, some the Christ; some would seize Him. Sharp division. The question of who He is splits the crowd.

The officers return, 'Never man spake like this man'; the Pharisees scorn the believing crowd. Disarmed. Even His enemies' servants feel His word's power.

Nicodemus asks if the law judges a man unheard; they reproach him, and all go home. A lone voice. One among them pleads for fairness.
